repair_memories_applied.natural_language: When NPU vector core exception (error code 507035, "rtDeviceSynchronizeWithTimeout execute failed, reason=[vector core exception]") occurs, do not use ALIGN_ELEMS=2048, HARD_CAP_ELEMS=8192, and maxTile=UB_BUDGET_BYTES/24; instead set ALIGN_ELEMS=16, HARD_CAP_ELEMS=4096, and maxTile=UB_BUDGET_BYTES/28 to allocate tiles within the UB budget.

repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: af791711 directly addresses gelu (same op) and vector core exception (507035), which can cause kernel compilation failures. 41508067 records AscendC compilation errors (e.g., undeclared expf, missing Subs) that mirror the kernel compilation error in gelu. d7872c76 (min_gpt_new_gelu) and 53e05051 (log_softmax) recall missing txt bundle blocks that lead to JSONDecodeError on empty json, matching the 'read json file failed' symptom. 2172b69c (softplus) reinforces the same txt bundle completeness fix, providing multiple examples for this common build failure pattern.
